name: Black blood
short_description: Black blood is a mix of hardcore Tower Defense strategy and top-down shooter. Act as a defender against alien invaders, attack and destroy all their insidious plans...
detailed_description:
Black Blood is a mix of Tower Defense and a top—down shooter where you have to defend 4 lighthouses from alien invaders. Use weapons, build defensive towers and upgrade them with the help of resources extracted from defeated enemies. Your assistant will be a drone that attacks, heals and repairs your structures if you improve its capabilities. Every decision matters — choose what to spend your limited resources on: new weapons, drone upgrades, or building defenses. The game combines action, strategy and survival elements, where it is important to properly manage resources and develop tactics for each stage.

Key Features:

  • Complex protection Build towers and protect lighthouses from waves of enemies.

  • Assistant drone it helps in combat, treatment and repair.

  • Lots of improvements upgrade weapons and structures.

  • Intense action dynamic battles with robots and aliens.

  • Retro graphics and soundtrack An atmospheric retro style game with great music.
